_comment: Release notes shown to users via the 'What's New' modal on login. Newest first. The frontend tracks the 'version' field per-user in localStorage; if the latest version is newer than what they've seen, the modal appears. Bookkeeper / Admin can edit this file in-place when shipping new features.

entries.title: 🚀 Mega-sweep — 11 team-feedback fixes (Revenue file upload · Revolut Personal parser · Bulk-ZIP export · Supervision + more)
entries.summary: Eleven issues from the latest team walkthrough closed in one push. Big wins: Revenue 'Add' button now WORKS and accepts a file upload alongside the form. Revolut Personal CSV format (Completed date / Counterparty BIC headers) now parsed. Costpocket-style Accounting bulk-ZIP export (all PDFs + spec.csv) for handover to external accountants. Bank Statement Imports archive now shows who uploaded, period range, in/out totals. Chase tasks include card last-4. Unmatched table shows AI-suggested responsible person. New granular sub-permissions (per-PC scope + capability codes) so accounting team members can have differentiated access.
highlights: 💵 Revenue 'Add proforma / invoice' — button works (was broken: wrong modal class), now also accepts a 📎 file upload (PDF/image/docx) saved to the data volume.
🏦 Revolut Personal CSV — new format spec recognises 'Completed date / Counterparty BIC / Counterparty IBAN' exports. Previously fell through to Generic and 0 rows imported.
🔎 Bank-name false-positive fix — Mercury + Stripe specs tightened so unrelated CSVs no longer get mis-labelled as Mercury in the archive.

📦 Costpocket-style bulk export — Accounting tab now has '📦 Bulk ZIP' button per Legal Entity. ZIP contains all invoice files + specification.csv (vendor / VAT / dates / PC / ledger / amounts / status / payment method) + README.txt. Send straight to your accounting firm.
👤 'Who's uploading?' field removed from Upload — uploader = logged-in user, automatic. Info banner replaces the dropdown.
💸 Payment date below 'Paid' status — Approve tab now shows '💸 dd-mm-yyyy' under the paid pill so the exact pay date is on screen.
🚫 Auto-post blocked without PC — Hetzner-style invoices no longer go POSTED with '— unassigned'. Classifier forces human review when profit_center is empty.
📨 Chase task format upgraded — per-tx line is now 'date · vendor · €amount · card ****1234'. Title auto-prefixed with '[PC]' when all rows share the same stream.
👥 Unmatched table — responsible person column inline next to Assign. AI-suggested PC + person shown before bookkeeper opens the modal.
📋 Past Statement Imports archive — full info: who uploaded, period covered (start→end), in/out totals in €, all 4 status counts (matched / suggested / unmatched / excluded).

🔐 Granular sub-permissions — admin form has PC-scope + permissions fields. Use to restrict bookkeeper to specific streams (e.g. 'CF,SP') or specific capabilities (e.g. 'mark_paid' only, no budget approval). Blank = role default.

entries.title: 🔧 Team feedback sweep — 7 issues closed (auto-post, partial payments, PC dedup, departments, parser errors, Revenue UX)
entries.summary: Seven issues from the team's MVP walkthrough closed in one sweep. Biggest win: Hetzner-style auto-post without profit-center is now forbidden — invoices land in human review instead of going to /dev/null. Partial payments now work on ANY invoice (was internal-only), with quick mini-modal from Confirm-for-Payment row and remaining-amount badge on the Amount column. Confirm-for-Payment groups by CANONICAL PC so 'Mountly' no longer appears twice. Department list synced with ledger (8 values, was 6). Bank Statement parser shows loud diagnosis when 0 rows imported. Revenue tab shows friendly explainer instead of bare 'forbidden' + first-time walkthrough banner.
highlights: 🚫 Auto-post BLOCKED when classifier can't resolve a profit center — fixes the Hetzner bug where invoices went POSTED with 'unassigned' PC.
💳 Upload 'I already paid this' banner now hard to miss — yellow border, bold label, plain-language hint that it's for the uploader, not the bookkeeper.

💰 Partial payment — quick mini-modal on each Awaiting-Payment row + Amount column shows €remaining / €total / €paid breakdown automatically when any partial instalment is logged. Internal-only restriction lifted.
🏷 Confirm-for-Payment 'To allocate' panel groups by CANONICAL PC — no more 2 'Mountly' rows (was AH + MT legacy). Canonical labels updated: AH = Amitours Holding, MN = Mountly, MT = Medical Travel.
🏢 Department list now 10 values (was 6): added Sales, IT, Admin, Development. Synced with ledger DIVISION column.

⚠ Bank Statement upload: when 0 rows imported, UI shows loud red diagnosis (date column not found / amount column not found / all duplicates / format mismatch) + headers seen — instead of silently 'succeeding'.
🔒 Revenue tab — 'forbidden' replaced with friendly 'your role X doesn't have access, required roles: ...' + first-time walkthrough banner explaining the proforma → invoice → receipt workflow.

entries.title: 🛡 Chase Task Supervision dashboard + fixed Asana dropdowns (timeout + cache)
entries.summary: Fixed the Project / Assignee dropdowns in the Create Asana task modal — they were timing out on /users (BT4YOU workspace has 150+ users × pagination). Bumped HTTP timeout 12s → 30s and added a 10-minute in-process cache so subsequent modal opens are instant. New 'Chase Task Supervision' dashboard on Bank Statement Audit shows every chase task ever created with done/pending split, by-stream and by-assignee breakdowns, completion %, and one-click refresh-from-Asana. Mirrors BT4YOU Executive Bot's Supervision Manager pattern.
highlights: 🛠 Asana /projects + /users no longer 500 — timeout bumped from 12s to 30s; results memoised for 10 min per workspace so the next modal opens instantly.
🛡 Chase Task Supervision dashboard (Bank Statement Audit tab) — KPI tiles (Done · Pending · Completion % · Total chased €), by-stream + by-assignee breakdowns, full task list with Asana deeplink.
🔄 'Refresh from Asana' button — hits /tasks/<gid> for every pending chase task and updates status to 'done' if the bookkeeper / stakeholder marked it complete in Asana.
💾 chase_tasks table — every task created via the chase modal is persisted with title, PC, assignee, due, tx_ids, attachments. Auditable from day one.

entries.title: 🎨 UX sweep — canonical stream pills · fixed Actions column · bulk chase tasks · Release history dropdown · Revenue tab in Legend
entries.summary: Pure UX polish: Analytics stream-filter pills now use canonical PC codes (SP / MN, plus the missing MT and RR — no more SR / AH-as-Mountly legacy labels). FIO Managed Users + Paying Accounts Actions column now stays inside the column (was collapsing into floating chips due to a CSS conflict). Chase Missing Invoices gets bulk-select checkboxes + a rich task creator with project / assignee / due-date dropdowns pulled live from Asana. What's New modal gets a 'Jump to version' dropdown so the team can re-read any past iteration. FIO Legend → Tabs at a glance now lists the new 💵 Revenue tab.
highlights: 🏷 Analytics stream-filter pills use canonical PC codes — SP (Skipasser, was SR), MN (Mountly, was AH), plus added MT (Medical Travel), AH (Amitours Holding), RR (Rock2Rock). Legacy SR / Mountly-AH rows still match via read-time translation.
🔧 Actions column floating-header bug — `.actions { display: inline-flex }` was breaking <th> layout on FIO Managed Users + Paying Accounts. Scoped flex to non-cell wrappers only.

☑ Bulk Chase Missing Invoices — checkbox on every unmatched transaction + 'select all in stream' header checkbox + 📨 Create bulk task button per stream. Rich modal: project + assignee + due-date dropdowns loaded live from Asana, auto-aggregated body with all selected tx.
📜 Release history dropdown in What's New modal — pick any past version to re-read the highlights. Also accessible from FIO Legend → 📜 Open release history.
📖 FIO Legend → 'Tabs at a glance' now lists 💵 Revenue + has updated descriptions for Confirm for Payment (preview-everywhere, multi-select ledger), FIO Legend (now includes Revenue glossary).

entries.title: 💵 NEW MODULE — Revenue / Accounts Receivable + 💸 Cashflow analytics + 🏦 Bank-match
entries.summary: Full inversion of the expense flow: FIO now tracks money coming IN as well as money going OUT. Issue proformas → convert to invoices → log receipts → status auto-advances. Phase 3 ships bank-statement auto-match: bank credits are scored against open receivables (amount + invoice# + customer name + PC + date proximity) and applied one-by-one or batch ≥80 score. New Cashflow chart in Analytics (revenue green / expense red per month). 18 new tests, full suite 140/140 green.
highlights: 💵 New 💵 Revenue tab — Proforma / Invoice / Credit-note workflow with status machine (Draft → Sent → Partially paid → Paid → Cancelled). Auto-status: receipts sum ≥ amount → flips to Paid.
🔁 Convert Proforma → Invoice in one click — proforma cancelled, invoice created with full back-reference + audit trail.
💸 Cashflow by stream card on Analytics tab — 4-KPI strip (Revenue / Expense / Net / Months), monthly bar chart, breakdown table per stream. Respects existing Analytics date-range + stream filter.
🏦 💵 Match revenue button on Bank Statement Audit archives — opens a modal with scored candidates per inflow + ⚡ Auto-apply ≥ 80 score for batch processing.
📖 FIO Legend updated — new Revenue / AR / AP / Cashflow glossary card explaining the proforma → invoice workflow and the bank-match flow.

entries.title: 🔧 Feedback sweep — PC codes canonical · header arrows · preview-everywhere · chase routing · multi-select ledger
entries.summary: 13 feedback items closed in one sweep (#85–#93). P0 fix for the LLM parser model (claude-sonnet-4-20250514 → claude-sonnet-4-6), PC codes synced with BT4YOU Executive Bot canonical ledger (read-time legacy translation, no destructive migration), header tab horizontal scroller with arrows, Preview button across ALL Confirm-for-Payment stages, Bank Statement preview after confirmation, chase tasks now routed to the correct stakeholder by stream, multi-select ledger codes filter with per-code EUR breakdown.
highlights: 🔧 [P0] Parser model migration — claude-sonnet-4-20250514 → claude-sonnet-4-6. Pure Peaks / Rēķini / Amitours invoices were 404-ing, now parsing again.

🏷 PC codes canonical sync with BT4YOU — services/pc_codes.py is single source of truth (AA / AH / AG / AL / CF / MN / MT / SP / RR). Legacy codes SR → SP, PK → CF auto-translated at read-time. Mountly = MN confirmed.
↔ Header tab horizontal scroller with ‹ › arrows — no more clipping on narrow screens. Active tab auto-scrolls into view on tab switch.
👁 Preview button now on ALL Confirm-for-Payment stages (Budget Check, Awaiting CEO, Awaiting Payment) — was previously only on some stages.
🔍 Bank Statement preview after confirmation — view the original CSV / XML even after the batch is archived. CSV viewer rendered in-app.
📨 Chase Missing Invoices — Asana task routed to the correct stakeholder (Holding CEO for AH, ALVEDA BO for AL, etc.) via chase_routing.stakeholder_for() reading holding_config.json.

☑ Multi-select ledger codes on Confirm-for-Payment — pick multiple codes at once, EUR breakdown strip shows totals per selected code. Codes grouped by statement (REVENUE / COGS / MARKETING / ADMIN / OPERATIONAL).

entries.title: 💰 Stream Budgets + 🚨 X-alarm wiring (CEO-agreed monthly caps with auto-overrun email)
entries.summary: Phase 3 ships the full Stream Budgets system per the architecture sketch. Admin loads CEO-agreed monthly caps per stream; when a confirmed payment pushes a stream over budget, FIO auto-fires X-alarm: email to CEO+Artjoms+Rita+stream-owner, in-app urgent bell, optional Asana auto-task. 24h dedup window prevents alert spam. Stream banner on Confirm for Payment shows live traffic-light status.
highlights: 💰 Stream Budgets (Admin tab) — set per-stream / per-month caps with CEO approval timestamp + notes + full change-log history. Live actuals computed from committed-status invoices.
🚨 X-alarm auto-fires on CEO confirm-payment when (pc, period) actuals exceed budget. 24h dedup so subsequent triggers update the same log row.

📧 Recipients auto-resolved: XALARM_CEO_EMAIL + XALARM_OPS_EMAIL (defaults to Artjoms) + first active bookkeeper from fio_users + stream owner from fio_users WHERE profit_center=PC AND role in (stream_owner,admin).
🔔 In-app urgent bell fires alongside email — gracefully degrades when SMTP/Asana not configured (Phase 2 SMTP wrapper). All paths log to xalarm_log with email_status for diagnostics.
📊 Stream banner on Confirm for Payment — per-stream traffic-light pills (green = in budget, yellow = <20% remaining, red = OVER) based on live actuals call.
🤖 Asana auto-task on overrun (when ASANA_PAT set) — task created on stream owner via existing services.asana_sync.create_task. URL stored in xalarm_log.asana_task_url.

entries.title: 🔔 In-app bell + 💬 Slack CEO alerts + 🏦 Bank archives + 💼 Salaries + SMTP foundation
entries.summary: Phase 2 ships: notification bell with auto-fire when CEO approves invoices; Slack integration for CEO urgent-payment alerts (graceful 503 until SLACK_CEO_WEBHOOK set); bank statement archive with re-check; salary doc tagging + payment-date filter in Confirm for Payment; SMTP foundation for Phase 3 X-alarm emails.
highlights: 🔔 Notification bell (top-right header) — badge shows unread count, modal lists all. Auto-fires for Rita when CEO approves an invoice. 60s polling.

🚨 Send to CEO (Slack) — admin/bookkeeper button in Awaiting Payment row → posts to Slack channel + in-app bell. Graceful fallback when SLACK_CEO_WEBHOOK secret not set (in-app only). Setup guide: docs/slack-setup-for-ceo.md.
🏦 Bank Statement Archives (Admin tab) — list past CSV imports, ↻ Re-check unmatched/suggested rows to pick up newly-uploaded invoices.

💼 Salary doc tag — toggle in detail modal. New filters in Confirm for Payment: 💼 Salaries only / Non-salary only / 🏢 Internal only + payment-date range filter (Bookkeeper request #2 from the feedback doc).
📧 SMTP wrapper (services/email_send.py) — foundation for Phase 3 X-alarm emails. Graceful when SMTP_USER/PASS not set.

entries.title: 🔍 Search/Sort/Date filters + 💰 Partial payments + 🛬 M&G stub endpoints
entries.summary: Bookkeeper backlog: search/sort/date-range in Approve queue, partial-payments tracking on internal invoices with auto-transition to paid when full amount reached. Plus Phase-3 prep: M&G stub endpoints live (graceful 503 until external dev side ships).
highlights: 🔍 Documents for Approval — new filter bar: search by vendor/file/amount (debounced 300ms), 6 sort options (date/amount/vendor/legal entity), date-from / date-to range, ✕ Clear button.

💰 Partial payments on internal invoices — toggle 'Internal invoice' in the detail modal. Add instalments (amount + paid_at + method + reference). Running progress bar. Auto-transition to status=paid when sum reaches invoice total.

🛬 Meet & Greet integration — three endpoints live as P85 graceful stubs at /api/mng/webhook, /api/mng/pull, /api/mng/status — returning 503 with hint until external dev team ships their side. Full contract in docs/meet-and-greet-dev-handoff.md.
📐 Stream Budgets architecture sketch — docs/stream-budgets-architecture.md describes the Phase-3 schema + X-alarm flow. Implementation ready to start in next session.

entries.title: 📋 Policies & Limits + ✓ Approved by Accounting + 🛬 Meet & Greet handoff
entries.summary: Internal corporate spending limits are now editable through a new Policies & Limits tab; Accounting can mark policy violations as reviewed (full audit log); Alveda/K2Y-style violations on already-approved invoices are hidden by default; and a self-contained dev-handoff doc for the Meet & Greet API bridge ships in /docs.
highlights: 📋 New tab — Policies & Limits (after FIO Legend): see every active spending rule (RED/YELLOW thresholds), edit limits inline (Admin/CEO), full change-log of who edited what when.
✓ Approved by Accounting checkbox on every Policy Violations row — click to record reason; toggle '[ ] Show resolved' to review history.
🤖 Policy violations on invoices already at confirmed_to_pay / paid / archived are now hidden by default — solves the K2Y/Alveda 'why is RED still showing after I approved it' confusion.
🔬 Classifier now reads thresholds from the DB (with graceful fallback to hardcoded defaults if table empty), so a CEO can change a corporate limit without a code deploy.

📨 Meet & Greet ↔ FIO API-bridge spec — bilingual (EN+RU) self-contained handoff doc for external developers in /docs/meet-and-greet-dev-handoff.md (webhook contract, pull API, auth, security checklist, 8-week timeline).

entries.title: ✏️ Editable chase template + 🎉 What's New on login
entries.summary: Bookkeeper can now customise the Asana/email task text used when chasing missing invoices, and new users see a release-notes popup the first time they log in after a change.
highlights: Admin tab → 📝 Chase task template — edit title + body with placeholders ({amount}, {vendor}, {date}, {pc}, ...)
Reset to defaults with one click; meta-line shows who last edited and when
🎉 What's New modal on login — current and recent releases at a glance

entries.title: 📊 Bank Statement Audit — month-close workflow
entries.summary: Card Audit renamed and expanded into a mandatory bookkeeper workflow for end-of-month reconciliation, including AI chase tasks for missing invoices.
highlights: Tab renamed Card Audit → Bank Statement Audit
🔐 Month-close checklist — 3 traffic-light checks (statements imported · all reconciled · every unmatched has owner)
🚀 Generate chase tasks — AI groups unmatched transactions by suggested business stream, produces per-tx Asana / email template, Open Asana / Copy buttons
📊 Monthly dashboard — tx count, money in/out/net, per-stream split, cases under investigation
Confidence % pill now shows scoring formula on hover (amount + date + vendor + payment method)
✓ Confirm button on suggested matches — promote suggested → manual in one click
⋯ Edit and Assign buttons now actually work (silent-bug fix from /transactions?limit=1)

entries.title: 🤖 AI follow-ups + bank reconciliation fixes
entries.summary: Self-review pass after the Top-10 shipped — gaps closed: AI badges, payment method radio, reparse endpoint, cross-period notices.
highlights: Upload → 📋 Already paid checkbox now has card / bank / cash / other radio (no more lying about cardholder)
Legal Entity dropdown shows 🤖 AI suggested / ⚙️ manual / ⚠ heuristic badge
🤖 Ask AI button next to empty Legal Entity dropdowns — re-runs parser to extract recipient
Card Audit Open buttons hop directly to the source invoice modal (no more 'transaction not found')
Cross-period notice when an invoice opens from a different month than your active filter

entries.title: 💳 Revolut import + Card Audit drill-down
entries.summary: Card Audit was broken on real Revolut Business CSV exports — now fixed. Plus the long-awaited 'where are my matched invoices' archive.
highlights: Revolut Business CSV import works end-to-end (was silently falling through to generic)
Card Audit archive of past imports + per-batch CSV download with match results
Mark Paid empty-state has a teleport CTA — '+ Add my first paying account' jumps to Admin tab
Server-side bank CSV auto-route — drop a Revolut CSV in Upload and it goes to Card Audit automatically
Dropped 'needs_to_pay' redundant state — payment state is now in_progress / on_hold / paid

entries.title: 🏦 Paying accounts + comment cascade
entries.summary: Bookkeeper roster of bank accounts, comment cascade between stages, FIO Legend with per-role responsibility cards.
highlights: Admin tab → 🏦 Paying accounts roster, Mark Paid now uses a real dropdown
Bookkeeper / CEO comments cascade forward through Confirm-for-Payment stages
Wider comment column in Awaiting Payment with expand-on-focus
FIO Legend — per-role cards (Uploader / Stream owner / Bookkeeper / Holding CEO / HR / Admin)
